dev.statement.main: A large-scale resort complex in Baku,
dev.statement.dim: located on the shores of the Caspian Sea.
dev.block1.title: Seaside City
dev.block1.text: Located in Baku on the shores of the Caspian Sea, Sea Breeze is a large-scale resort city that combines a coastal lifestyle, iconic architecture, modern infrastructure and high investment potential.
dev.block2.title: A Single Unified Space
dev.block2.text: A unique space that brings together residential real estate, a resort lifestyle and long-term investment potential in one of the region's largest projects.
overview.title:
Sea Breeze
Project Overview
proj1.desc: An iconic mixed-use complex on a 6-hectare artificial peninsula, Caspian Dream Liner offers premium apartments and hotel residences fully ready for occupancy. The project delivers a resort lifestyle with an infinity pool, sky bar, boutiques, beauty salons, fine-dining restaurants and panoramic areas, all with open views of the Caspian Sea.
proj2.desc: A visionary project on a 50-hectare artificial island shaped like a crescent and star, Halfmoon will include exclusive residential complexes, world-renowned hotel brands including Hilton and JW Marriott, full living infrastructure and premium leisure and entertainment facilities, creating a new landmark on the Caspian Sea.
proj3.desc: A future architectural symbol and the tallest building in Azerbaijan at 323 meters, designed by Shaun Killa, Cipriani Tower will become a landmark of the Caspian coast. The project showcases innovation, ambition and contemporary architectural excellence, radically reshaping the city's skyline and setting a new global standard for modern design.
realestate.title: More than 50 unique real estate projects. Sea Breeze offers a wide range of residential formats on the Caspian coast.
invest.title: Why Invest in Sea Breeze
invest1.label: Annual growth in property value
invest2.label: Passive rental income
invest3.label: Professional property management
invest3.desc: All rental, maintenance and day-to-day operations are handled by the management company, making the investment as comfortable as possible.
benefits.title: Benefits and Privileges for Residents
benefit1.title: Private access to beaches and pools
benefit1.text: Entry is via special resident wristbands.
benefit2.title: Privileges for exclusive events
benefit2.text: Access to private events and activities for residents only.
benefit3.title: Special ABB card for residents
benefit3.text: Special discounts, restaurant bonuses and additional banking benefits.
lifestyle.dim: Everything you need for living and leisure at Sea Breeze within a single ecosystem.
